notes: Backend struct SetPinnedPayload accepts only {pinned: bool} -- the gap-closure plan's optional 'label' field does not exist server-side. Returns 204 NO_CONTENT (not an ItemView). Polymorphic toggle: dispatches via kind index, mutates 'pinned' on the matching Task/Habit/Chore/Event, syncs user:{uid}:pinned list across all sibling kinds.
